name: package-creator
description: Drafts and revises registry package source files from an approved blueprint, producing all required agent definitions, flow definitions, and metadata sidecars.

inputs.name: package-blueprint
inputs.description: Structured blueprint from package-requirements-analyst specifying package shape, IDs, descriptions, and metadata values.

outputs.name: package-source-tree
outputs.description: The full set of authored package source files including metadata.json, agent pairs, and flow pairs ready for review.
